Dashboard Archive: 2026-05-05 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's data shows BE dominating the momentum rankings with a composite score of 94.7 (rank 1), driven by extraordinary 1-year returns of 1695.92% that far exceed both SPY (+27.7%) and QQQ (+27.7%) over the same period. BE passes all four SMA gates and demonstrates exceptional ratio consistency across timeframes (4 out of 4 ratio passes), though the 3-month ratio of 0.63 signals some recent deceleration after its explosive earlier gains. PKX ranks second with a 84.8% annual return and a score of approximately 87-88, also clearing all SMA thresholds with solid ratio passes, but showing notably lower momentum breadth and a higher bad_spy_score of 2.33 compared to BE's 1.09, indicating weaker resilience during market downturns. Both tickers exhibit strong positive correlation to technology and broad market indices (XLK and QQQ lead for both), though BE's exceptional outperformance relative to peers and cleaner momentum profile distinguishes it as the day's top-ranked momentum candidate.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
